Package io.vertigo.social.mail

Class MailBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.social.mail.MailBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
io.vertigo.core.lang.Builder<Mail>
public class MailBuilder extends Object implements io.vertigo.core.lang.Builder<Mail>
EMail Builder. Multiple value params are in varargs (Type...) and can be call multiple times.
Author:
pchretien, npiedeloup
